name: My First Architecture
description: A minimal CALM architecture containing a single customer authentication service.

nodes.name: Customer Authentication Service
nodes.description: Validates user credentials and manages session tokens.

nodes.name: Customer Authentication Database
nodes.description: Stores customer authentication data for the Customer Authentication Service.

nodes.name: Customer
nodes.description: End user who uses the Customer Authentication Service.

nodes.name: Customer Authentication System
nodes.description: Overall system containing the customer authentication service and its database.

relationships.description: System is composed of the authentication service and database.
Customer interacts with the Customer Authentication Service.
Connects to the database for storing and retrieving authentication data.
